summary: Completed testing of InventoryV2 NEW features: Add Purchase button, Filters (Status/Category/Brand), Summary card click filtering, Export button removal. All 16 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.

POST /api/products with initial stock batch works

Export button correctly removed from UI
Filter panel expands with Status, Category, Brand dropdowns

Status filter selection filters inventory correctly
Category filter dropdown populated with categories
Brand filter dropdown populated with brands
Critical summary card click filters by out_of_stock status
Warning summary card click filters by low_stock status
Healthy summary card click filters by healthy status
